message:

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "podman-container-tools-27628-add-support-to-migrate-data-in-boltdb-to-sqlite",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "podman-container-tools: Add support to migrate data in boltdb to sqlite",
+    "description": "Add support to migrate data in boltdb to sqlite. Requested by 53+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current podman-container-tools setup",
+        "description": "Verify your podman-container-tools version and configuration:\n```bash\npodman --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working podman-container-tools installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-container-tools configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:\n### Feature request description\n\nWith version 6.0 boltdb is being removed, ahead of this in version 5.7.0 the message `The deprecated BoltDB database driver is in use. This driver will be removed in the upcoming Podman 6.0 release in mid 2026."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add support to migrate data in boltdb to sqlite",
+        "description": "This is gated behind a new option in `podman system migrate`, `--migrate-db`.\n\nThe basic logic is simple:\n* Podman is already configured to use BoltDB\n* Open a new, fresh SQLite database to write into\n* Migrate all database contents as they exist in BoltDB, to SQLite. ** Do this as simply as possible: grab the object from the old DB\n   and write it into the new DB using the standard Add and Save\n   functions.\n* Set the new database in the Runtime, close the old one.\n* Move the old database file\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add support to migrate data in boltdb to sqlite\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This is gated behind a new option in `podman system migrate`, `--migrate-db`.\n\nThe basic logic is simple:\n* Podman is already configured to use BoltDB\n* Open a new, fresh SQLite database to write into\n* Migrate all database contents as they exist in BoltDB, to SQLite.",

+    }
